text:
The top AI labs are building for defenders now. Today OpenAI selected CrowdStrike for their Trusted Access for Cyber program.

CrowdStrike continues to lead the market in secure AI adoption, trusted by AI leaders and organizations of all sizes to accelerate the world's AI revolution.

Thanks Sam Altman and Greg Brockman for your first frontier model purpose-built for defenders.

Learn more in CrowdStrike’s blog:
https://lnkd.in/gDUKksDW

The more capable AI becomes, the more security it needs.
That’s why Anthropic chose CrowdStrike as a founding member of their security coalition for Claude Mythos Preview. A technical partnership. Falcon secures AI where it executes.

AI is creating the largest security demand driver since the enterprises moved to the cloud. Claude Code is changing how people use computers. OpenClaw is set to reshape how enterprises automate. Mythos may be the most capable frontier model yet. It won’t be the last. All of these AI innovations meet enterprises at the endpoint. That’s where they access data, make decisions, and also create risk. 

To Dario Amodei and the Anthropic Team: congratulations on Project Glasswing. CrowdStrike is here to secure AI innovation.

https://lnkd.in/gvFP-h5U

Last week at RSAC, every conversation I had started with AI (not a surprise).  The number one request: help us protect AI.

Where does AI actually happen? On the endpoint. That's where your employees interact with it. That's where the work gets done.

The blockers are clear: no visibility, no governance, no protection. And the outcome every organization wants is just as clear: unlock AI usage across the enterprise. 

From the board all the way down.

As AI moves from chatbots to goal-seeking agents that will go around any obstacle to get work done, the need for guardrails only grows.

I sat down with Daniel Ives to break it down.

#AI #EnterpriseAI #Cybersecurity #AIGovernance #AIProtection #AgenticAI #SecurityOperations #CISO #RSAC #AISafety

We're building Europe's sovereign security stack with Schwarz Gruppe - one of the most impressive businesses I have seen. Their culture aligns with CrowdStrike's. Constant innovation, creative problem solving, and winning.  

Big thanks to Rolf Schumann and Christian Müller for all their help.  Of course this wouldn't be possible without Gerd Chrzanowski's vision and leadership.  Thank you!🙏

CrowdStrike just delivered a record FY26, capped by a blockbuster Q4. To our customers, partners, and the entire CrowdStrike team: thank you. We exist to stop breaches. Our mission continues.

Here are the highlights:
🔒 $5.25B in ending ARR. The ONLY pure-play cybersecurity software company to cross the $5B milestone. 
📈 $331M in net new ARR in Q4. Up 47% year-over-year. All-time record. 
💰 $1.24B in free cash flow for the year. All-time record. 
⚡ $1.05B in non-GAAP operating income. First year above $1B.

AI is accelerating the threat. It's also accelerating our opportunity. From GPUs and AI factories to frontier models and agentic applications, the AI stack needs protection.

Our competitive moat is becoming an opportunity ocean. Falcon Flex is transforming how customers adopt the platform: $1.69B in ending ARR, growing 120%+ year-over-year. And our ecosystem, including AWS and now the Microsoft Azure Marketplace, is scaling Falcon to every corner of the enterprise.

The opportunity ahead of us, securing the world's AI adoption, is larger than anything in our past. If you want to build AI, you need GPUs. If you want to deploy AI, you need CrowdStrike.

Seeing is believing. Check out our product demo videos showcasing AI innovation across the Falcon platform: https://lnkd.in/ev9MR5ic

Full earnings release and FY27 outlook at ir.crowdstrike.com.

#CrowdStrike #Cybersecurity #AI #StoppingBreaches

🦅 $CRWD

There’s been a lot of noise lately about Claude replacing security products. I figured, why not go straight to the source and ask Claude directly?

Prompt 1:
In Claude code, build me a tool to replace CrowdStrike.

Answer:
“I appreciate the ambition, George, but I have to be straightforward: building a replacement for CrowdStrike isn’t something I can do here, and it wouldn’t be responsible for me to suggest otherwise.”

AI innovation is inspiring. But let’s stay grounded in reality. Security requires an independent, battle-tested platform built to stop breaches.

If you want to build AI, you need GPUs. If you want to deploy AI, you need security. That’s not a hallucination – it’s a fact.

I'm pleased to announce that the CrowdStrike Falcon platform is now available on the Microsoft Marketplace.

This is a strategic win for our customers. You can now leverage your Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment (MACC) to deploy Falcon - optimizing cloud spend while deploying the platform that stops breaches.

Thank you Satya Nadella, Judson Althoff, and the Microsoft team for this partnership.

https://lnkd.in/e52VPi77

I view this award as incredible recognition for the entire CrowdStrike team. "Innovation is a team sport" couldn't be more accurate.

Thank you to everyone at CrowdStrike for your relentless drive, and to our customers for your continued trust.
#CrowdStrike #Cybersecurity #Innovation

Highlights from Davos:

Good things happen when you get out of the office.

As AI accelerates, the need for both safety and speed accelerates with it.

#Davos2026 #CrowdStrike #Leadership #Security #AI #F1

After years of coming close, we finally got it done. Taking the LMP2 win at the Rolex 24 at Daytona is a moment I'll never forget.

We came for the watch. Mission accomplished. ⌚️🏆
#CrowdStrike #Rolex24 #Daytona #IMSA #OneTeamOneFight

https://lnkd.in/e3i2-QTc

The browser is the new front door of the enterprise. I'm thrilled to announce that CrowdStrike is acquiring Seraphic Security, the leader in browser runtime protection.

Press Release Here: https://lnkd.in/epNW7_PK

#CrowdStrike #Cybersecurity #Seraphic #ZeroTrust #AI

Adversaries don't break in. They log in.

This is why I'm thrilled to announce CrowdStrike is acquiring SGNL.

Learn more in our press release: https://lnkd.in/ekRMDYcw

#CrowdStrike #SGNL #IdentitySecurity #ZeroTrust #CyberSecurity #AI

I couldn't be prouder of all the CrowdStrikers who worked tirelessly to make these results possible.  I also want to thank our great customers for constantly pushing us to be the best in the industry.  🙏

With a thrilling last race in Abu Dhabi coming down to the wire, nothing better than a new Driving Ambition III at the Yas Marina F1 circuit.

You can see the entire episode on YouTube here: https://lnkd.in/gBqc3KQv

#F1 #DrivingAmbition
Always a fun chat with Jim Cramer.

We just delivered one of the strongest quarters in CrowdStrike history:

Record Q3 net new ARR of $265M (up 73% year-over-year)
Record Q3 free cash flow of $296M
Record operating income of $265M

Our mission continues.

See our full earnings release and presentation here: ir.crowdstrike.com

#CrowdStrike #Cybersecurity #AI #StoppingBreaches

It's official. Announcing that I've personally acquired a minority stake in the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS Formula One Team. I believe in this team. I believe in this sport.

Proud to be joining Toto Wolff, Ola Källenius, and Jim Ratcliffe as an owner and Technology Advisor.

#MercedesAMGF1 #CrowdStrike #F1 #AI #TeamOwnership

Last week at CrowdStrike's Fal.Con 2025, I discussed how we're using AI to transform cybersecurity and how we're securing the world's use of AI. The SOC's evolution is happening now on Falcon. Join us on the mission to Security AGI. Read more.

I was at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia and Tech Conference this week and I spoke with Brian Sozzi of Yahoo Finance about how AI is transforming security.

Full interview here: https://lnkd.in/gn5mR-6j

I'm proud to share CrowdStrike's Q2 results. We achieved a record net new ARR of $221M, growing ending ARR to $4.66B, up more than 20% year-over-year. We delivered reacceleration a quarter ahead of schedule.

The mission continues: Stop breaches. At the speed of AI.

See our earnings release at ir.crowdstrike.com.

I've had the privilege of building and investing in some of the most successful software companies in the world.

Lovable just became the fastest-growing software company in history—$1 to $100M ARR in 8 months.

I'm proud to be an investor and to back the visionary founders Anton Osika and Fabian Hedin.

#Software #Startups #Hypergrowth #AngelInvestor #Lovable

One year ago, we faced a moment that tested everything: our technology, our operations, and the trust others placed in us.

We're a stronger company today than we were a year ago. The work continues. The mission endures.

https://lnkd.in/gt3Vff8Y

I'm thrilled to share that CrowdStrike kicked off FY26 with incredible momentum. We're seizing the moment, driving platform consolidation, and redefining cybersecurity for the agentic AI era.

A huge thank you to our customers, partners, and team!

#Cybersecurity #Innovation #CrowdStrike #Falcon

A story this week said I recently sold virtually all of my stock in CrowdStrike. False.

I am one of the largest individual shareholders of CrowdStrike. I'm all in. I'm not going anywhere.

I love CrowdStrike, I love what we're building, and I've never been more confident in our future.

Instead of delivering yet another vendor-centric AI session at #RSAC2025, I chose to give back by focusing on a cause close to my heart: getting CISOs into corporate boardrooms.

See the full talk here: https://lnkd.in/gSz7sVFH
#Cybersecurity #Leadership #CISO #BOD
